name: Cycling
description: Using it as transport or going for a ride is very thrilling, feeling the air while sliding through the road and looking at a nice scenary is a good experience.

name: Swimming
description: Getting a good swim or just feeling the water before or after a typical day is a very relaxing activity, even after an intense training session.

name: Brazilian Jiu Jitsu
description: Commitment to a long lasting sport such as Martial Arts enriches the body, mind and gives a feeling of community among training partners.
